response.justification: Strong fullstack profile with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ requirement. Solid match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and current AI-agent/MCP work aligns directly with the internal automation tooling and AI agent requirement. Polyglot background (Java, C/C++, DLang, Python implied) and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) fit a mid-senior IC role. Gaps: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, PostgreSQL, or major cloud (AWS CDK only briefly mentioned, no GCP/Azure/Kubernetes depth shown beyond GIS deployment). Worth interviewing to validate framework-specific depth.
strengths: Direct AI agent / MCP experience matching a key requirement
13+ years fullstack across TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing, open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited PostgreSQL and Kotlin/Java recency for secondary stack
Cloud/Kubernetes depth unclear beyond AWS CDK and self-hosted GIS
